raw_text: REFERRAL — Cardiology. Pt: Maria Gonzalez DOB 04/18/1969. MRN BV-88231. Dx: I20.0 Unstable angina. Requesting: Outpatient cardiology consult + stress echo (CPT 93350). Insurance: BlueShield PPO, Member ID BSC-4471-9920, Group 88123. PCP: Dr. Alan Reyes NPI 1295847362. Clinical note: Exertional chest pain x3 weeks, troponin negative, EKG nonspecific ST changes. Conservative tx (nitrates, ASA) started 5/30. Prior EKG and lipid panel attached.
